name: codex-sdd-planner
description: Spec-driven development workflows for Codex, starting with lane-based code review.

interface.longDescription: Codex SDD Planner brings spec-driven development workflows to Codex. This initial version focuses on the lane-based code review system: drift, quality, spec compliance, and blind-spot review lanes with a synthesized result.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run the SDD code-review workflow for this implementation.
